verificationNote: Indicative mapping between ASEAN DG controls and Malaysia PDPA 2010, with links to the pdpa-my CBDT module.
title: ASEAN Data Governance to Malaysia PDPA Mapping
description: Maps ASEAN data governance controls to Malaysia Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (Act 709), specifically the Cross-Border Data Transfer provisions.

mappings.notes: Transfer mechanisms must comply with PDPA CBDT provisions. See pdpa-my CBDT module.

mappings.pdpaDescription: Minister may specify countries with adequate protection
mappings.notes: Adequacy assessment aligns with Minister's determination of adequate protection countries.
Transfer safeguards implement PDPA security principle for cross-border flows.

mappings.pdpaDescription: Prohibition on cross-border transfer except with compliance
mappings.notes: Data localization assessment ensures PDPA CBDT compliance.
Classification framework supports lawful processing determination.

mappings.pdpaDescription: Transfer with consent or contractual safeguards
mappings.notes: ASEAN MCCs provide contractual safeguards for PDPA CBDT compliance.
Cross-border DSAR handling implements PDPA access principle across jurisdictions.
Multi-jurisdictional incident response includes PDPA breach notification.
